#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 27 2003 at 4:42 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Thanks for posting that just in case we couldn't read it the first 2 times.
A druid can own any Rogue, amazingly buffed or not
QuoteReply
# Sep 14 2002 at 7:36 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591775312328
2 posts
I don't know what you are talking, but no rogue can beat the same lvl druid in a duel, don't care what gear they have or not
▲ Page top
RE: A druid can own any Rogue, amazingly buffed or not
QuoteReply
# Nov 18 2003 at 5:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256029093
30 posts
You obviously dont know what your talking about. IF someone has very high resists, like many in higher tier guilds do, the druid will never land a spell on the rogue. The only way your theory is correct, which was "no rogue can beat the same lvl druid in a duel, don't care what gear they have or not." is if the druid ports or runs away.

KKThx
▲ Page top
RE: A druid can own any Rogue, amazingly buffed or not

110 posts

Excuse me, Sytto Tosscobble, But i bet you that a halfing rogue with the right equipment would own any druid, whtehr you can snare or not is nothing if the rogue has 100+ MR. Halfings aren't weak, my rogue has 220 str before buffage. So i'd be quiet before one of us slits your throat friend.

class listing

# Dec 25 2001 at 5:48 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591758192731
View User Forum
Scholar
32 posts
Don't know why this happens?? Beast Lord is listed in class that can use.Seen any Halfling BL'S?Hehe just wondering aloud)
▲ Page top
RE: class listing
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2002 at 5:24 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591761195679
203 posts
When Luclin came out, a lot of items got tagged beastlord usable. Allakhazam did a bunch of guesses in the database, so that all armor that is usable by more than one class, and is druid usable, got marked beastlord usable.

I think for races, anything usable by barbarians got marked vah shir usable.
▲ Page top
